rationale: This skill builds frontend interfaces (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Vue), so the agent will read existing project files (configs, components, styles) and write new component/style/markup files. Distinctive typography guidance implies fetching custom fonts, typically from Google Fonts or CDN-hosted font/library sources. React/Vue scaffolding and Motion library usage imply package management subprocesses (npm/npx/yarn/pnpm via node) to install dependencies and potentially run dev servers. No deletions are implied by the skill's creative-generation verbs.
